gcp.androiddeviceprovisioning.operations.description: Gets the latest state of a long-running operation. Clients can use this method to poll the operation result at intervals as recommended by the API service.

required.description: The name of the operation resource.

gcp.androiddeviceprovisioning.partners.d.description: Claims a device for a customer and adds it to zero-touch enrollment. If the device is already claimed by another customer, the call returns an error.
